content: TOTP 2FA common pitfalls: (1) No rate limiting on TOTP attempts allows brute force of 6-digit codes; (2) Clock drift causes intermittent failures — allow ±1 step window; (3) TOTP secret stored unencrypted — must encrypt at rest; (4) Backup codes not truly single-use if delete race conditions exist; (5) 2FA enforcement gaps: after-auth hooks that access newSession.user without null-checking crash during 2FA challenges since session is discarded mid-flow; (6) Race condition: users can replay valid session cookie without completing 2FA if session tracking is broken; (7) Never expose backup codes in API response after initial generation.
